variantAxes.description: Ordered list of prop names (or pseudo-axis names like 'state') that emit as Figma variant properties on the master. The cartesian product of these axes defines the COMPONENT_SET variants. Order determines the order of dimensions in each variant's name (e.g. 'Variant=primary, Size=md, State=hover').

componentProperties.description: Figma component-property declarations applied to the master via addComponentProperty() AFTER combineAsVariants. These are scalar overrides (TEXT/BOOLEAN/INSTANCE_SWAP), not variant axes. Each property binds to a tree node attribute (visibility, characters, mainComponent) on a node identified by targetSelector.

slots.description: Render anatomy of the component as a flat list of named slots. Each slot has a semantic role (name), a Figma layer name (figmaSlotName), and a tokenBinding describing which token paths drive which CSS/Figma properties on that slot. Optional during the 8-V migration window; becomes the source of truth for figma-masters-batch.mjs in 8v-3 and is required for any spec carrying a `tokens` field starting in 8v-5.

tier.description: Component classification used for asymmetric documentation weight and LLM-surface filtering. Required — every spec in componentSpecs and utilities must carry a tier. Definitions: primitive = atomic, generally-interactive building blocks shipped as the public flagship API (HdsButton, HdsInput, HdsCard, HdsDialog) — heavy doc weight (full API pages, prop tables, anatomy diagrams). pattern = composition of primitives expressing a recurring product intent (HdsBreadcrumbs, HdsToolbar, HdsAlertBanner) — light doc weight (usage page with one canonical example). template = page-shaped layouts that consume primitives + patterns (HdsAppShell, HdsAuthLayout, HdsSettingsLayout) — kept in componentSpecs but not surfaced in public-facing human docs (templates are gallery-only). utility = behavioral, runtime, or non-visual helpers that don't render product surfaces (HdsControls, HdsErrorBoundary, HdsNotFoundPattern) — physically isolated under top-level `utilities` (peer to componentSpecs), hidden from LLM-facing inventory and public docs. Public docs surface = primitive + pattern only. The `experiment` tier was removed in 8x-6 — exploratory work lives in the vibe sketchbook outside the component library.

stability.description: API stability classification surfaced in doc-page headers (HdsDocPageHeader from 9d-4). Optional/additive — when absent, consumers compute a default: primitives default to 'stable'; patterns and templates default to 'beta' when they lack a `slots[]` array or carry propConstraints warnings, otherwise 'stable'. Setting an explicit value overrides the computed default and lets newly-introduced primitives ship with a 'beta' badge during their stabilization window.

deprecations.description: Top-level manifest section listing deprecated source patterns scanned by `node scripts/audit-tokens.mjs --scan-source`. Replaces the legacy hard-coded RULES array in the deleted scripts/audit-component-source.js. Keys: `patterns` (array of deprecationPattern entries).

deprecationPattern.description: A single deprecated pattern. `regex` is the JavaScript RegExp source (no enclosing slashes). `flags` is the RegExp flag string (e.g. 'gi'). `category` is one of typography|spacing|structural|spatial and drives audit metric counters. `replacement` (optional) names the HDS component or token that should replace the deprecated pattern. `rationale` is the human-readable explanation surfaced in audit output.

name.description: Human-readable Figma property name shown in the panel. Title Case with spaces (e.g. 'Leading icon').

type.description: Figma component-property kind. BOOLEAN binds to node visibility; TEXT binds to text node characters; INSTANCE_SWAP binds to instance mainComponent.

defaultValue.description: Default value applied to the property at creation. For BOOLEAN: true|false. For TEXT: the placeholder string. For INSTANCE_SWAP: the default master component name.

sourceProp.description: React prop name this property maps from. Used by the JSX compiler to translate prop values to Figma property values when generating instances.

boundTo.description: Figma node attribute that the property reference attaches to. Defaults per type: BOOLEAN → visibility, TEXT → characters, INSTANCE_SWAP → mainComponent.

targetSelector.description: Logical name of the tree node this property attaches to. The plugin matches the master's child node by this name. Convention: PascalCase (e.g. 'Label', 'IconLeft').

invert.description: If true, the JSX compiler negates the source prop value before applying. Useful for cases like iconOnly→Label.visible where the Figma boolean represents the inverse of the React prop.

name.description: Semantic role of this slot in the component anatomy. Vocabulary should be reused across components — common names: background, label, icon-leading, icon-trailing, divider, placeholder, helper-text, error-text, scrim, content. Avoid component-specific names (e.g. 'button-bg' — just use 'background').

figmaSlotName.description: Layer name to match in the Figma master component tree. Required when tokenBinding is present so the projection step in 8v-3 knows which Figma layer to bind to. Convention: PascalCase (e.g. 'Background', 'IconLeft', 'Label').

defaultValue.description: Optional fallback value for this slot when no tokenBinding resolves (e.g. a literal string for label slots, a hex color for background slots in tests). Mostly used by fixtures and snapshot tests.

tokenBinding.description: Maps slot CSS/Figma properties to design-token paths. Each value is a dot-delimited token path string (e.g. 'semantic.color.surface.raised', 'semantic.space.layout.tight') that resolves through hirobius.tokens.json. Null entries explicitly suppress a property; absent entries fall back to component defaults.

fill.description: Background fill token path. Mapped to Figma SOLID paint via setBoundVariableForPaint.

stroke.description: Border stroke token path. Mapped to Figma stroke paint.

paddingX.description: Horizontal padding token path (sets paddingLeft + paddingRight in the plugin).

paddingY.description: Vertical padding token path (sets paddingTop + paddingBottom in the plugin).

cornerRadius.description: Border-radius token path. Bound via setBoundVariable on the cornerRadius property.

typography.description: Composite typography token path (font-family + size + weight + line-height + tracking). Resolved against semantic.typography.*.

color.description: Foreground / text color token path (for text slots).
